body: Yarn rate phir se up is week — MMF mehenga ho raha aur Surat me kuch processing units 2-din weekly closure ki baat kar rahe. Georgette ka base cost badh gaya, to thode buyers wapas cotton ki taraf dekh rahe. Wedding lot ka order steady hai par margin tight — jisko bulk chahiye, rate lock karke abhi book kar lo.

GST ab yarn aur fabric dono pe flat 5% ho gaya — pehle wale mixed rates ka confusion khatam. Kum capital block hoga aur billing clean rahegi, bulk buyers ke liye faida. Wedding-lot ke zari embroidery orders steady chal rahe, jinko bulk work karana hai woh abhi rate lock kar lo.

Export ka mahaul acha chal raha — India ka textile export 7% up, naya record ban gaya. Surat ke synthetic aur embroidery lots ki demand bahar se steady hai, aur buyers ab zyada online B2B pe order finalize kar rahe. Export-ready quality wale ke liye achha window — packing aur documents clean rakho, festive shipment abhi se plan kar lo.

July me market thoda thanda hai, par yehi sahi time hai festive samples taiyaar karne ka. Navratri aur wedding lot ke design abhi lock karo — Sept aate hi acche hand-embroidery karigar milna mushkil ho jaata hai. Humein workshop pe 2-3 experienced zari karigar chahiye, kaam pakka aur rate sahi. Interested log aa jao.
